meme.title: Ancient egyptians knew what they were doing

headlines.h: Markets React To: warned you so
headlines.b: Treat futures up. Productivity down. The couch remains occupied.

headlines.h: Exclusive: Government Announces New Standard: “Ancient egyptians knew what they were doing"
headlines.b: Applies to boxes, laundry baskets, and your freshly folded clothes (especially those).
Officials confirm this is being treated as a "meow-jor" development. (Filed: 2026-03-21)
The peer review process consisted of one stare, two slow blinks, and a decisive nap.
